phase_protocol.pm: accepts or rejects each phase before next phase starts
phase_protocol.orchestrator: schedules only current phase tasks and updates docs/progress.md
phase_protocol.pause_resume: close running agents, keep partial tasks out of done, resume from current_phase pending or partial task

P6-final-acceptance.reason: Frontend has typed contract only and no deployable browser UI; full-project acceptance was incorrect.

P9-system-management-ui.remaining: P10-P12 visual usable phases are still required before full project deployability.

P10-app-runtime-ui.remaining: P10 must complete browser-driven app/module/field/page publish and runtime record UI before acceptance.

P12-uiux-frontend-rework.reason: User feedback confirmed that frontend has functional pages but lacks frozen UI/UX design and product-level usability.

P13-usability-rework.reason: User deployment feedback confirmed P12 over-claimed ordinary-user usability.

last_governance_fix.reason: Development must be managed by role issue discovery, PM decision, owner reply, reviewer verification, test, validator, and stage commit instead of ad-hoc continue prompts.
last_governance_fix.agent_session_failure: planner/frontend subagents spawned in the previous attempt could not be addressed by send_input; their work is not counted as complete.
